items.title: RM100 Allowance For Nurses For 17 Years: A Test Of National Leadership — MMA
items.summary: MMA calls for an immediate decision to increase the post-basic nursing allowance to a minimum of RM500 per month. The post RM100 Allowance For Nurses For 17 Years: A Test Of National Leadership — MMA appeared first on CodeBlue .

items.title: Ensuring Sustainability And Equity In Malaysia’s Dental Health Care System — MPDPA
items.summary: Malaysians must continue to receive safe, accessible and high-quality dental care, within a system that is sustainable and equitable for all. The post Ensuring Sustainability And Equity In Malaysia’s Dental Health Care System — MPDPA appeared first on CodeBlue .

items.title: Doctor Retention Requires System Reform, Not Just Sentiment — Dr Azizan Abdul Aziz
items.summary: Malaysia has a strong foundation of dedicated health care professionals, and we must ensure that the system supports them as much as they have supported the nation. The post Doctor Retention Requires System Reform, Not Just Sentiment — Dr Azizan Abdul Aziz appeared first on CodeBlue .

items.title: Don’t Reduce Complex Health System Challenges To Cheap Caricatures — Dr Kamal Amzan
items.summary: To suggest that distrust in private health care is driving patients to the public sector because private care is fundamentally transactional, or because doctors may be motivated by personal extravagance, is unfair, reductive, and irresponsible. The post Don’t Reduce Complex Health System Challenges To Cheap Caricatures — Dr Kamal Amzan appeared first on CodeBlue .

items.title: Distrust In Private Health Care Driving Patients To Government: NCSM
items.summary: A growing trust deficit in private health care is driving patients to public facilities, adding strain to an already stretched system, says NCSM’s Dr Murallitharan, as concerns over costs, complexity, and insurer practices deepen. The post Distrust In Private Health Care Driving Patients To Government: NCSM appeared first on CodeBlue .

items.title: ‘Perfect Storm’ Hits Malaysian Poultry Sector As Feed, Fuel Costs Squeeze Farmers
items.summary: Malaysia’s poultry sector faces a “perfect storm” of rising feed, fuel, and fertiliser costs, forcing small farmers to cut output, says MPA. But FLFAM says supply remains ample and the current shock is “nothing” compared to Covid-19 and the Ukraine war. The post ‘Perfect Storm’ Hits Malaysian Poultry Sector As Feed, Fuel Costs Squeeze Farmers appeared first on CodeBlue .

items.title: When Performance Takes A Back Seat: Rethinking Promotion Culture In Malaysia’s Public Health Sector — Dr Musa Mohd Nordin
items.summary: Restoring confidence in promotion practices is not just about fairness. It is about safeguarding the future effectiveness, morale, and integrity of our public health institutions. The post When Performance Takes A Back Seat: Rethinking Promotion Culture In Malaysia’s Public Health Sector — Dr Musa Mohd Nordin appeared first on CodeBlue .

items.title: Malaysia’s Mental Health Workforce At A Crossroads — Counsellor
items.summary: Strengthening system capacity is no longer optional, but essential to meeting current and future mental health needs. The post Malaysia’s Mental Health Workforce At A Crossroads — Counsellor appeared first on CodeBlue .

items.title: MOH Wants New Dialysis Patients To Choose PD Amid Potential HD Product Shortages
items.summary: MOH exhorts new dialysis patients to choose peritoneal dialysis (PD), amid potential shortages of haemodialysis (HD) components. MOH says local manufacturers highlighted rising prices of plastics and related products, but no supply shortages currently. The post MOH Wants New Dialysis Patients To Choose PD Amid Potential HD Product Shortages appeared first on CodeBlue .

items.title: Malaysia Facing Delayed Medicine Supplies, Don’t Panic Buy, Say Importers
items.summary: Pharmaceutical importers highlight a delay of medicine shipments into Malaysia by some two weeks, but the shipments are still coming in although freight costs are surging rapidly. Consumers are advised to maintain sufficient supply, rather than panic buy. The post Malaysia Facing Delayed Medicine Supplies, Don’t Panic Buy, Say Importers appeared first on CodeBlue .

items.title: Firm used overdraft to pay Bersatu RM1m in 2022, court hears in Muhyiddin power abuse trial
